Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor with 168-day overdue invoice #4460 suggests systemic payment delay or dispute; tighten to net-45 pending resolution.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: 7 days overdue on €3,296; large retail chain payment delays warrant reduction from likely net-60.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: 53 days overdue on €9,558 export invoice; apply stricter terms pending dispute resolution.

Wittich Weine und Biere AG.reason: Due today on €3,236; German distributor shows payment friction; enforce net-30 going forward.

Salama Shop.reason: Own channel with two overdue invoices (67+ days); internal customer must revert to daily/COD settlement.

alerts.message: Call credit manager immediately: €18,484 overdue 163 days (invoice #4460, due 2025-10-30). Confirm goods receipt, dispute status, and demand payment or 10-day escalation plan. Risk to renewal of major contract.
Escalate €9,558 overdue 54 days (invoice #5151) to management. Contact customer today with 5-day payment demand or order suspension notice.

Total overdue AR is €78,333 (39% of open AR). Fixed costs of €62,781/month plus €79,996 in open POs create acute cash gap. Halt all discretionary spend and prioritize cash collection over next 7 days.
Internal channel with €2,451 overdue (invoices #5350, #3). Enforce immediate daily settlement or COD; do not extend credit to own operations.
€5,882 overdue 280 days (invoice #3837, due 2025-07-05). Legal recovery or write-off decision required; no further sales on credit.
€4,540 overdue 603 days (invoice #14, due 2024-08-14). Likely uncollectible; recommend write-off and legal closure to clear AR.
Bemböle contract (€25K/mo) ends September 2026 (5 months). Model revenue cliff; identify replacement contracts or new channels now to maintain growth trajectory.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €78K overdue AR (39% of ledger) colliding with €62.8K fixed monthly costs and €80K open POs creates severe 7–10 day liquidity crisis; collection rate must exceed 60% this week or covenant/loan covenant breach risk.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy and My Dear Beer B.V. within 2 hours with 5-day payment ultimatums; confirm no goods disputes. Simultaneously, suspend all non-essential PO commitments and ask ODOO procurement to defer €20K of the €80K open orders until May cash recovery.
pattern_insights: Export customers (B.V., AG, SLU, PTE LTD) show 30–60+ day delays vs. budget DSO; apply net-30 to all new export contracts and require 50% advance or letter of credit.
Large domestic distributors (Alko, Kesko) are 7–168 days overdue; escalate disputes/holds today and consider COD or prepay for future orders to protect cash during 62% YoY growth phase.
insights.wc_note: Working capital is critically stretched: €126K open AR + €80K POs outstrip €40K monthly revenue (30-day view) and €62.8K fixed costs; growth-driven receivables inflation is choking cash. Without aggressive collection or credit policy reset, growth will halt at next covenant review.
